hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f || exit 0; [[ "$f" == *.yaml ]] || exit 0; [[ "$f" =~ /talos/ || "$f" =~ /kubernetes/ ]] || exit 0; cd /home/m3adow/Nextcloud/projects/wieseschwarm && pre-commit run --files "$(realpath --relative-to=/home/m3adow/Nextcloud/projects/wieseschwarm "$f")"; }
